name: Boston Chicken Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 Can cream of celery soup (10 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan on medium heat, stir together with a wire whisk the cream of celery soup, flour, butter, garlic salt, and pepper until smooth and piping hot.
2. Add 20 ounces frozen chopped spinach and cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
3. Drain the spinach thoroughly.
4. Stir in 1 small diced onion.
5. (MY NOTE: I'd substitute fresh minced garlic for the garlic salt.)
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
